# ReadyStack Digital

> ReadyStack Digital is a Sydney-based agency that builds secure digital foundations for Australian small businesses — website, Microsoft 365, email security (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), and Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 alignment, built and managed properly.

## About

ReadyStack Digital was built to fix a common pattern: most small business websites are launched in a hurry then quietly break over the following two years — forms stop sending, SSL certificates lapse, Microsoft 365 sits insecure with no MFA enforced, email authentication is never configured, and search rankings slip.

ReadyStack combines enterprise-grade web, Microsoft 365, and cyber security practices — static-first website architecture, proper DNS and email authentication, Essential Eight ML1 alignment, and monitored monthly care — and applies them to small businesses at small business prices.

- Location: Sydney, NSW, Australia
- Delivery: Australia-wide
- Email: hello@readystackdigital.com
- Phone: +61 481 619 784
- Website: https://readystackdigital.com

## Services

### SMB Online Presence
Fast, mobile-friendly, SEO-ready websites with domain, hosting, SSL, contact forms, WhatsApp/call buttons, schema markup, and Google Search Console setup. Everything a local business needs to look professional online.
- Price: from $1,000 one-off (typical $1,500–$3,000)

### Microsoft 365 for Small Business
Professional Microsoft 365 setup — tenant configuration, custom domain, business email with MX/SPF/DKIM/DMARC, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint basics, and MFA enforced from day one.
- Price: from $750 setup

### Essential Eight Alignment for SMBs
Practical Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 setup — application control basics, patching baseline, MFA, restricted admin privileges, and configurable Microsoft 365 hardening. Suitable for SMBs needing to demonstrate cyber security maturity for clients, insurance, or government tenders.
- Price: from $2,500 one-off + optional monthly monitoring

### Email Security & Domain Protection
SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and MTA-STS records configured for your domain so emails reach the inbox and your domain identity is protected from spoofing. DMARC monitoring and reports included.
- Price: from $450 one-off + optional monitoring

### Monthly Managed Care
Ongoing monthly care across website, domain, Microsoft 365, email security, and Essential Eight controls.
- Website Care: $100/month
- Website + M365 Care: $300/month
- Full Stack Care: $600/month

## Packages

### Online Presence Starter — from $1,000 one-off
One-page website, domain setup, hosting, SSL, contact form, basic SEO, Google Search Console. Best for businesses that just need a professional site.

### Online Presence + M365 — from $1,750 one-off (Most Popular)
Everything in Starter plus Microsoft 365 Business setup, business email with full SPF/DKIM/DMARC, MFA enforced. Best for businesses that need both a website and professional email/M365 from day one.

### Secure SMB Foundation — from $4,000 one-off
Everything in Online Presence + M365 plus Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 setup, Intune device baseline, conditional access, hardened M365 tenant. Best for SMBs demonstrating cyber security maturity for clients, insurance, or government tenders.

### Monthly Managed Care — three tiers
- Website Care: $100/month (website, hosting, domain, DNS, SSL, form testing, basic SEO)
- Website + M365 Care: $300/month (website + M365 user lifecycle + MFA review + DMARC reports + monthly security review)
- Full Stack Care: $600/month (website + M365 + Essential Eight monitoring + monthly security report + priority support)

## Process

1. Intake brief — business details, services, branding, domain needs, M365/security requirements
2. Plan — website structure, Microsoft 365 configuration, email security setup, Essential Eight scope, monthly care tier
3. Build — website, hosting, forms, SEO basics, M365 tenant, email authentication, security controls
4. Review — client review before launch with adjustments
5. Launch — site goes live, M365 and security controls activated, monthly care begins

## Industries served

- Service providers and consultants
- Trades and contractors
- Recruitment businesses
- Allied health clinics (physio, podiatry, psychology, dental)
- Restaurants and hospitality
- Professional services firms needing to meet client or insurer security requirements
- Other small businesses Australia-wide

## What makes ReadyStack Digital different

- Combines website, Microsoft 365, and cyber security into one managed offering
- Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 alignment practical for SMBs, not just enterprise
- Email authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, MTA-STS) configured properly on every relevant build
- Static-first website architecture — fewer plugins, fewer login surfaces, fewer security risks
- Schema markup included on every website build for better search and AI assistant visibility
- Monthly care is actively monitored across the full digital stack, not just the website
- Transparent pricing, all add-ons quoted upfront
- Sydney-based with Australia-wide delivery
